/usr/bin/ar qc liboms_core.a CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/FixMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/FixParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/OrderBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/PositionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/RiskEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/OrderBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/MockExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oms_core.dir/src/OmsEngine.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboms_core.a
